en: Now they told us that Vietnam was going to be very different from the United States of

en: America, except for all the beer cans and the barbeque, it was.

en: Hey, I bet they shrimp all in these waters, they tell me these Vietnams is good shrimp.
After we win this war, we take over everything, we can get American shrimp to come out here
ko: 우리가 이 전쟁에서 이기면 모든 것을 차지하고, 미국 새우를 이곳으로 데려와서 이 물에서 새우를 잡을 수 있습니다.

en: and shrimp these waters, we just shrimp all the time, man, so much shrimp out here.
